hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" || exit 0; changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null); py=$(echo "$changed" | grep "^modules/.*\.py$" || true); ts=$(echo "$changed" | grep "^_mcp_server/src/.*\.ts$" || true); ok=true; if [ -n "$py" ]; then echo "=== Python checks ==="; uv run ruff check modules/ || ok=false; uv run ruff format --check modules/ || ok=false; fi; if [ -n "$ts" ]; then echo "=== TypeScript checks ==="; cd _mcp_server && npx tsc --noEmit || ok=false; npx biome check $(echo "$ts" | sed "s|^_mcp_server/||g") || ok=false; fi; $ok'
